name: hue-rotate() CSS function - MDN Web Docs
snippet: A positive hue rotation increases the hue value, while a negative rotation decreases the hue value. The initial value for interpolation is 0 .

name: Tweening hue-rotate on an image - GSAP
snippet: I can do this instantly with the simple CSS value of {-webkit-filter: hue-rotate(180deg);} but I would much rather have the colors fade through ...

name: Color Shifting in CSS • Josh W. Comeau
snippet: Each particle starts on a random color and changes hue as it fades out. This seems pretty straightforward, but appearances can be deceiving. In ...

name: hue-rotate() - CSS-Tricks
snippet: The hue-rotate() function rotates the color of an element and its content to a specified hue on the color wheel.

name: Text Color Animation with CSS Filter Hue Rotate | Happy Diwali - YouTube
snippet: In this video you'll learn to create text color animation using hue-rotate() and keyframes of CSS3.
